locations.name: 撒哈拉沙漠
locations.summary: 撒哈拉沙漠（阿拉伯語：الصحراء الكبرى，aṣ-Ṣaḥrāʾ al-Kubrā ， 清朝直譯大沙漠）位於非洲大陸北部，是世界最热的荒漠，亦是世界第三大荒漠，仅次于南极和北极，同时也是世界上最大的沙漠，其总面积超过9,400,00…

relations.subject: African paradise flycatcher
relations.evidence: It generally inhabits open forest and savanna, and is a locally common resident breeder in Africa south of the Sahara

relations.subject: African paradise flycatcher
relations.evidence: The African paradise flycatcher is found in most parts of Africa south of the Sahara Desert and also the Arabian Peninsula
